name: Squidpy (Spatial Single-Cell Analysis)
pricing_notes: Open source (BSD-3-Clause); scverse / Fabian Theis lab

performance.notes: AnnData-backed; GPU optional; spatial graph construction scales with cell count

agent_readiness.notes: Spatial single-cell analysis extending Scanpy. import squidpy as sq. sq.gr.spatial_neighbors(adata, coord_type='generic', delaunay=True). sq.gr.nhood_enrichment(adata, cluster_key='leiden'). sq.gr.co_occurrence(adata, cluster_key='leiden'). sq.gr.spatial_autocorr(adata, mode='moran'). sq.pl.nhood_enrichment(adata, cluster_key='leiden'). sq.pl.spatial_scatter(adata, color='leiden'). Image analysis: sq.im.ImageContainer. Feature extraction: sq.im.calculate_image_features. Visium, Merfish, seqFISH data.

gotchas: Neighborhood enrichment requires > 100 cells per cluster for reliable results
Image analysis features require large memory for high-resolution images
Rapidly evolving API — check version compatibility with Scanpy
best_when: Spatial transcriptomics analysis (Visium, MERFISH, seqFISH, Xenium)
Cell-cell communication and spatial interaction analysis
Moran's I spatial autocorrelation for spatially variable genes
Image feature extraction from H&E stains alongside transcriptomics
avoid_when: Standard scRNA-seq without spatial coordinates (use Scanpy)
When CellChat or NicheNet ligand-receptor approaches are preferred
summary: Squidpy extends Scanpy for spatial single-cell analysis. sq.gr.spatial_neighbors(adata). nhood_enrichment(), co_occurrence(). spatial_autocorr(mode='moran') for spatially variable genes. sq.pl.spatial_scatter(). Image features from H&E. BSD-3 by scverse. Best for Visium, MERFISH, seqFISH, Xenium spatial transcriptomics. Requires spatial coords in obsm['spatial']. Part of scverse ecosystem.
